title: Public and private package boundary
text: Public mdm-sources packages contain curated redistributable profiles. Generated vanilla source, remapped source, ProbeJS dumps, modpack-derived indexes, and embeddings over private content belong to MCP local cache.

title: Release channel selection
text: Install required packages first. Add docs, datapack, resourcepack, mappings, sources, or accelerators only when the workspace task needs that evidence. Avoid monolithic all-channel installs by default.

title: Mapping bundle purpose
text: Mapping bundles explain namespace relationships such as official, intermediary, named, Yarn, Parchment, and Mojmap. They help translate crash and source evidence without requiring every source tree to be downloaded first.

title: Datapack and resourcepack split
text: Datapack profiles describe data-driven server content. Resourcepack profiles describe assets, models, textures, atlases, language, sounds, UI assets, and shader-related paths. Treat them as separate package families.
